source.note: Bootstrap seed transcribed from the manual. Replace/augment by regenerating from an M1 Build firmware export to pick up the installed firmware version and the project object tree.

Calculate.doc: Common arithmetic: statistical, trigonometric and time-based helpers, plus readability helpers.

functions.name: Absolute
functions.doc: Absolute value of argument.

functions.name: Average
functions.doc: Average of two arguments.

functions.name: Between
functions.doc: True if argument is within [min, max] for at least filter time.

functions.name: Beyond
functions.doc: True if argument is outside [min, max] for at least filter time.

functions.name: Bias
functions.doc: Biased average. bias -1 = min(a,b), 0 = average, +1 = max(a,b).

functions.name: Ceiling
functions.doc: Round up to the next higher integer value.

functions.name: FastCos
functions.doc: Cosine (<0.5% error).

functions.name: FastSin
functions.doc: Sine (<0.5% error).

functions.name: FastSquareRoot
functions.doc: Square root (<0.0013% error).

functions.name: FastTan
functions.doc: Tangent (<0.5% error).

functions.name: Floor
functions.doc: Round down to the next lower integer value.

functions.name: Hysteresis
functions.doc: True if argument >= High for filter time, false if <= Low for filter time.

functions.name: Infinity
functions.doc: A value representing positive infinity.

functions.name: InverseCos
functions.doc: Inverse cosine.

functions.name: InverseSin
functions.doc: Inverse sine.

functions.name: InverseTan
functions.doc: Inverse tangent.

functions.name: InverseTan2
functions.doc: Inverse tangent including quadrant.

functions.name: IsNAN
functions.doc: Test whether the argument is not a number.

functions.name: Max
functions.doc: Greater of two arguments.

functions.name: MaximumFloat
functions.doc: The maximum floating point value.

functions.name: Min
functions.doc: Lesser of two arguments.

functions.name: Modulo
functions.doc: Remainder of Argument / denom.

functions.name: NAN
functions.doc: A value that is "not a number".

functions.name: PI
functions.doc: Constant value of PI.

functions.name: Power
functions.doc: x to the power of y.

functions.name: Stable
functions.doc: True if argument has not changed for Filter seconds.

CanComms.doc: CAN messaging control and status. Get*/Set* read/write fields of the message buffer held by a handle.

functions.name: BusStatus
functions.doc: Enumerated status of the specified bus.

functions.name: GetBit
functions.doc: Read one bit from message at bit offset 0..63.

functions.name: GetFixed7DP
functions.doc: Read fixed point 7DP number from CAN message.

functions.name: GetFloat
functions.doc: Read 32-bit IEEE754-2008 float from CAN message.

functions.name: GetID
functions.doc: Extract message ID from current CAN receive message.

functions.name: GetInteger
functions.doc: Extract a signed integer of size bitlen (1..32) from offset bitoff (0..63) in current CAN receive message.

functions.name: GetLength
functions.doc: Message length in bytes of specified handle.

functions.name: GetTicks
functions.doc: Message receive time in ticks.

functions.name: GetUnsignedInteger
functions.doc: Extract an unsigned integer of size bitlen (1..32) from offset bitoff (0..63) in current CAN receive message.

functions.name: Init
functions.doc: Initialise CAN bus at kbaud kilobits/second.

functions.name: RxMessage
functions.doc: Receive CAN message from handle.

functions.name: RxOpenExtended
functions.doc: Open a CAN receive handle on bus (0-2) at 29-bit address match with address mask, word alignment if bigendian.

functions.name: RxOpenStandard
functions.doc: Open a CAN receive handle on bus (0-2) at 11-bit address match with address mask, word alignment if bigendian.

functions.name: SetBit
functions.doc: Set one bit in message at offset 0..63.

functions.name: SetFloat
functions.doc: Write 32-bit IEEE754-2008 float into CAN message.

functions.name: SetInteger
functions.doc: Populate a signed integer of size bitlen (1..32) at offset bitoff (0..63) in current CAN transmit message.

functions.name: SetUnsignedInteger
functions.doc: Populate an unsigned integer of size bitlen (1..32) at offset bitoff (0..63) in current CAN transmit message.

functions.name: TxExtended
functions.doc: Transmit from current handle on bus at 29-bit address ID.

functions.name: TxExtendedRR
functions.doc: Transmit CAN remote request frame with extended id.

functions.name: TxInitialise
functions.doc: Clear message of current handle before populating; len bytes.

functions.name: TxOpen
functions.doc: Open a transmit CAN handle; bigendian byte order if true.

functions.name: TxStandard
functions.doc: Transmit from current handle on bus at 11-bit address ID; returns true if transmitted.

functions.name: TxStandardRR
functions.doc: Transmit CAN remote request frame with standard id.

functions.name: XOR8
functions.doc: Exclusive-or of all bytes in message.

Change.doc: Boolean results determined by whether the argument changed in a given fashion. Stateful.

functions.name: By
functions.doc: True if argument changed by delta for filter time.

functions.name: By
functions.doc: True if argument changed by delta.

functions.name: Down
functions.doc: True if argument changed downwards by delta for filter time.

functions.name: Down
functions.doc: True if argument changed downwards by delta.

functions.name: Either
functions.doc: True for one iteration after >= filter seconds from cond changing.

functions.name: Either
functions.doc: True for one iteration after cond changes.

functions.name: From
functions.doc: True for one iteration after >= filter seconds from cond becoming false.

functions.name: From
functions.doc: True for one iteration after cond becomes false.

functions.name: To
functions.doc: True for one iteration after >= filter seconds from cond becoming true.

functions.name: To
functions.doc: True for one iteration after cond becomes true.

functions.name: Up
functions.doc: True for one iteration after >= filter seconds from arg increasing past its previous value by delta.

functions.name: Up
functions.doc: True when arg increases past its previous value by delta.

Convert.doc: Convert a value from one data type to another.

functions.name: ToInteger
functions.doc: Round to nearest Integer.

functions.name: ToUnsignedInteger
functions.doc: Round to nearest Unsigned Integer.

Debounce.doc: Boolean results determined by whether the argument stayed stable for the filter time (timing starts on a state change). Stateful.

functions.name: Fast
functions.doc: Debounce cond for at least filter seconds.

functions.name: Filter
functions.doc: Debounce cond with smoothing filter and 0.2/0.8 hysteresis.

functions.name: Stable
functions.doc: Debounce cond for >= filter seconds; restart if cond reverts.

functions.name: Verify
functions.doc: Debounce cond for >= filter seconds; verify new state after filtering.

Delay.doc: Boolean (or delayed) results after a delay defined by the delay time. Stateful.

functions.name: Falling
functions.doc: cond must be false for >= delay seconds before output goes false.

functions.name: Rising
functions.doc: cond must be true for >= delay seconds before output goes true.

functions.name: Signal15
functions.doc: Delay signal by up to 15 samples.

functions.name: Stable
functions.doc: argument must be stable for >= delay seconds before output goes true.

functions.name: Stable
functions.doc: argument must be stable for >= delay seconds before output goes true.

functions.name: Normal
functions.doc: Normal derivative.

functions.name: Filtered
functions.doc: Filtered derivative.

functions.name: Adaptive
functions.doc: Adaptive filtered derivative using minimum delta and maximum time max_dt before update.

Filter.doc: Common filter models. y[n] = a0*x[n] + b1*y[n-1] with a0 = dT/(tc+dT), b1 = 1-a0. Stateful.

functions.name: FirstOrder
functions.doc: First order filter of Argument with time constant tc.

functions.name: FirstOrder
functions.doc: First order filter with reset (resets to current x[n]).

functions.name: Maximum
functions.doc: Track higher value of Argument; filter towards smaller values.

functions.name: Maximum
functions.doc: Filter.Maximum with reset.

functions.name: Minimum
functions.doc: Track smaller value of Argument; filter towards greater values.

functions.name: Minimum
functions.doc: Filter.Minimum with reset.

functions.name: Normal
functions.doc: Integral of argument clamped within [min, max], with optional reset function and preset value.

Limit.doc: Clamp the argument to max, min, or both.

functions.name: Max
functions.doc: Value limited to max.

functions.name: Min
functions.doc: Value limited to min.

functions.name: Range
functions.doc: Value limited within [min, max].

functions.name: Running
functions.doc: True if logging is running.

functions.name: Running
functions.doc: True if logging system (0-7) is running.

functions.name: Unloading
functions.doc: True if logging is unloading.

functions.name: Unloading
functions.doc: True if logging system (0-7) is unloading.

functions.name: Used
functions.doc: Ratio of flash memory used in system (0-7).

Serial.doc: Serial (RS232/LIN) messaging. Get*/Set* read/write the message buffer held by a handle.

functions.name: GetHandle
functions.doc: Open a serial handle.

functions.name: GetInteger
functions.doc: Read signed integer.

functions.name: GetLinOffset
functions.doc: Find the data offset for a LIN frame with the specified ID.

functions.name: GetTransmitHandle
functions.doc: Open transmit-mode serial handle.

functions.name: GetUnsignedInteger
functions.doc: Read unsigned integer.

functions.name: LinDump
functions.doc: Print all packets to the ECU log.

functions.name: PortDiagnostic
functions.doc: Check serial port diagnostic.

functions.name: PortInit
functions.doc: Initialise serial port for communications.

functions.name: Receive
functions.doc: Receive data from the serial port.

functions.name: SetFloat
functions.doc: Write floating point value into serial message.

functions.name: SetInteger
functions.doc: Write integer into serial message.

functions.name: SetLinHeader
functions.doc: Write a LIN header into the serial message.

functions.name: SetString
functions.doc: Write a string into serial message.

functions.name: SetUnsignedInteger
functions.doc: Write unsigned integer into serial message.

functions.name: Sum8
functions.doc: Sum of the message data bytes.

functions.name: Transmit
functions.doc: Send length bytes on serial port.

functions.name: XOR8
functions.doc: Exclusive-or of the message data bytes.

System.doc: ECU system services: timing, memory, debug, tuning state.

functions.name: AllowTuning
functions.doc: Enable or disable calibration modifications.

functions.name: CpuIdle
functions.doc: Proportion of time the CPU is idle (ratio).

functions.name: Debug
functions.doc: Write a message to the ECU system log.

functions.name: Debug
functions.doc: Write a message to the ECU system log with a value.

functions.name: ElapsedTime
functions.doc: Elapsed seconds since this line of code was executed.

functions.name: EventMiss
functions.doc: Times this thread has missed an event.

functions.name: FlashSize
functions.doc: Size of flash memory.

functions.name: HiResTickPeriod
functions.doc: High resolution tick period in seconds.

functions.name: HiResTicks
functions.doc: High resolution tick count (<10 seconds).

functions.name: HiResTicksSince
functions.doc: Elapsed high resolution ticks since the supplied tick count.

functions.name: Preserve
functions.doc: Force a preserve of all flash-backed channels (max 1Hz).

functions.name: RamSize
functions.doc: Size of RAM memory.

functions.name: SerialNumber
functions.doc: ECU serial number.

functions.name: TickPeriod
functions.doc: System tick period in seconds.

functions.name: Ticks
functions.doc: Current system tick count.

functions.name: TicksBetween
functions.doc: Ticks between begin and end.

functions.name: TicksRemaining
functions.doc: Ticks from ticks to limit.

functions.name: TicksSince
functions.doc: Ticks since prev.

functions.name: TimedDebug
functions.doc: Write a log message, limited to one per second.

functions.name: XcpConnected
functions.doc: True if tune software is connected to the ECU.

functions.name: StrCat
functions.doc: Join two strings together (calibration methods).

Math.doc: Calibration maths functions. Usable only within M1 Tune calibration methods, not in ECU scripts.

functions.name: Abs
functions.doc: Absolute value of argument.

functions.name: Acos
functions.doc: Arccosine, in radians.

functions.name: Asin
functions.doc: Arcsine, in radians.

functions.name: Atan
functions.doc: Arctangent, in radians.

functions.name: Cos
functions.doc: Cosine, in radians.

functions.name: Cosh
functions.doc: Hyperbolic cosine, in radians.

functions.name: Exp
functions.doc: Exponential (natural e).

functions.name: Exp10
functions.doc: Exponential (base 10).

functions.name: IsNaN
functions.doc: Test whether the argument is not a number.

functions.name: Log
functions.doc: Logarithm (natural base).

functions.name: Log10
functions.doc: Logarithm (base 10).

functions.name: Max
functions.doc: Greater of two arguments.

functions.name: Min
functions.doc: Lesser of two arguments.

functions.name: Sgn
functions.doc: Sign of the argument (-1, 0 or +1).

functions.name: Sin
functions.doc: Sine, in radians.

functions.name: Sinh
functions.doc: Hyperbolic sine, in radians.

functions.name: Sqr
functions.doc: Square of argument.

functions.name: Sqrt
functions.doc: Square root of argument.

functions.name: Tan
functions.doc: Tangent, in radians.

functions.name: Tanh
functions.doc: Hyperbolic tangent, in radians.

UI.doc: Calibration UI functions. Usable only within M1 Tune calibration methods.

functions.name: PromptOK
functions.doc: Display a dialog box with the given title and message.

objectMethods.name: AsInteger
objectMethods.doc: Integer representation of an enumerated value.

objectMethods.name: AsString
objectMethods.doc: String representation of an enumerated value.

objectMethods.name: Set
objectMethods.doc: Set the object to v (clamped to validation range).

objectMethods.name: Validate
objectMethods.doc: True if v is within the validation range.

objectMethods.name: Constrain
objectMethods.doc: Constrain v to the object's limits.

objectMethods.name: GetUnscheduled
objectMethods.doc: Read value but exclude from scheduling dependency analysis.

objectMethods.name: Lookup
objectMethods.doc: Interpolated table lookup (y, z optional depending on axis count).

objectMethods.name: GetScaled
objectMethods.doc: Scaled physical value of a received CAN signal (scale/offset applied).

objectMethods.name: Receive
objectMethods.doc: True if a new message has been received for this object since the last call.

objectMethods.name: Start
objectMethods.doc: Start (or restart) the timer counting down from period.

objectMethods.name: Reset
objectMethods.doc: Reset the timer to its initial state.

objectMethods.name: Remaining
objectMethods.doc: Time remaining on the timer (zero once elapsed).

scopeAnchors.In: Input-arguments object of the current function; In.<Arg> reads an arg.
scopeAnchors.Out: Return-value object of the current function; assign with Out = ....
scopeAnchors.Parent: The parent group of the current object; chain Parent.Parent. to walk further up the group tree.
scopeAnchors.Root: The project root group; start of an absolute object reference.
scopeAnchors.This: The group the current object lives in; disambiguates same-named objects / library names.
scopeAnchors.Library: Forces the library namespace; use when a project object shadows a library name, e.g. Library.Calculate.Max(...).

unsupported.==: use 'eq' (only on Integer or Enumeration; never on Floating Point)
unsupported.while: iteration is not supported; M1 code runs once per scheduled event
unsupported.for: iteration is not supported; use 'expand ... to' for inline repeats

lexing.localDeclaration: local [<Type>] name = value;  (type inferred if omitted)
lexing.staticLocalDeclaration: static local [<Type>] name = value;  (initialiser must be literal/enumerator/constant)
lexing.expandSubstitution: $(name) inside an 'expand (name = a to b) { }' block (pure text substitution, not type-checked)

naming.objects: Begin with an uppercase letter; spaces allowed between words; referenced by parent group (Fuel.Pressure).
naming.locals: Begin with a lowercase letter (camelCase optional); no spaces.
naming.enumerators: Keep short; value 0 = neutral/initial state; negatives for errors, positives for normal operation.

diagnostics.rule: A stateful (purple-icon) library function must not be called conditionally or inside a comparison; call it every execution.
A channel may be assigned at most once per code path (not in two functions, not twice in one). Use if/else or a local instead.
Equality/inequality (eq/neq) is not supported on Floating Point; compare with a tolerance via Calculate.Absolute(a - b) < eps.
Comparisons between signed and unsigned integers are not allowed; use Convert.ToInteger / Convert.ToUnsignedInteger.
A when/is must cover every enumerator of the argument's enum.
Integrated-only objects (BR2, GPS, ...) must not be called directly.
Overload is deprecated; prefer its replacement.
Names must not differ only by case, nor collide with a class or library function name.
Token is not part of M1PL (see 'unsupported' for replacement).
